since_last: 56% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.81%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +1.89% · Gold +0.20% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 56% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.81%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.81%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.93%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BIDU is the standout at -4.41%
cards.body: Leaders: PLTR +3.99%, AVAV +3.51%, ADBE +2.75%, ADBE +2.75%, INTU +1.31%. Laggards: BIDU -4.41%, ARM -2.51%, DELL -2.51%, MRVL -2.08%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.03% at $157.58
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
